pageContext.name: Bettie Page's Eyes
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and Ozone Productions present the Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print, a quintessential pinup piece by renowned artist Olivia De Berardinis. This Sideshow Exclusive color variant is a highly collectible addition to any home gallery.  Olivia pays tribute to the one-of-a-kind pinup pioneer Bettie Page in this dazzling composition that is big on hair and even bigger on personality! Shining pink ribbons add a burst of color against Page's volumized pin curls as she gazes at the viewer, a mischievous smile on her lips. The variant's unique blue and yellow gradient background adds a sunrise softness to this seductive portrait celebrating the iconic model's enduring appeal.  Each Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print is hand-signed by Olivia and includes both her official embossed Seal of Authenticity and a Certificate of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of only 175 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this is must-have pinup artwork for Olivia collectors and Bettie Page fans alike.  This one's worth a second glance — don't miss your chance to bring home the Sideshow Exclusive Bettie Page's Eyes Fine Art Print by Olivia De Berardinis!
